overview: Capno-H is a portable Capnograph and Oximeter designed for continuous monitoring of ETCO2/CO2, respiration rate, SpO2, and pulse rate.The device supports both Sidestream and Mainstream monitoring technologies, making it suitable for intubated and non-intubated patients in various clinical environments. Kingst’s infrared gas analysis technology ensures accurate and stable measurements with advanced compensation systems for pressure, temperature, and gas balance.Its compact design, long battery life, and optional Bluetooth connectivity make it ideal for anesthesia, emergency care, ICU, transport, and procedural sedation applications.
features: Temperature, pressure compensation, and zero readjustment system for enhanced accuracy
Balance gas compensation minimizes interference from other gases
Pump flow selectable for adult and infant patients
Water-filter design suitable for humid environments
Compatible with intubated and non-intubated patients
Audio-visual alarm system for exceeded limits and apnea
24-hour trend graph memory retained after power-off
Optional software for data review, analysis, and printing
Optional Bluetooth module and Bluetooth printer support
Large-capacity lithium battery up to 10 hours operation
Analog output compatible with multi-parameter monitors
